raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "In California, 34% of women experience domestic violence in their lifetimes.",
    "Women who are survivors of human trafficking have a 90% chance of being arrested and charged with a crime rather than being rescued.",
    "California law currently prevents survivors of abuse from sharing relevant information about their victimization during court processes.",
    "AB 1497 allows survivors of violence to share their trauma in court to help judges and juries make more informed sentencing decisions.",
    "An affirmative defense can be utilized by survivors if evidence shows that they were coerced to commit an offense due to their trauma.",
    "Vacatur permits survivors to petition the court to clear their record of convictions related to their abuse and victimization."
  ]
}
```
